data.body: G3 (parent f89d × child 59ef) — owned-criteria verdict: this child's slice (verified-fake dual-run shape-contract harness = SC1 fidelity half / contributes AC1 honesty) is FULLY covered and consistent with its declared scope (fixtures→fe57, snapshot round-trip→8937 explicitly OUT). No coverage gap attributable to child 59ef itself. Per the prior audits on this ticket and across the roster, the only roster-level gap remains parent AC6 (documented anti-change-detector guardrail GOVERNING new tests): every child including 59ef AC3 only applies the posture to its own tests; no sibling produces the documented governing artifact. Re-emitting structured finding for this pairing's record per G3; AC6's natural home remains keystone 8937 or a small dedicated child.
